rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §7.059, which governs mathematics homework and grading services. No overlap in subject matter, funding mechanism, or operative language.
quote: From funds appropriated for the purpose, the commissioner shall help make available services that assist teachers in providing and grading mathematics homework assignments.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns mathematics homework services and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemption amounts.
